intents.response: Hello! Welcome to our website. How can I help you?
We offer Web Development, AI Solutions, Cloud Services and Software Development.
You can contact us at support@example.com or call +91 9876543210.
Our working hours are Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM.
Pricing depends on the service. Please contact our support team for a quote.
You're welcome! Let me know if you need any other help.
Our refund policy allows refunds within 7 days.
Refunds can be requested within 7 days of purchase.
Our office is located in Bangalore, India.
You can reach us at support@example.com.
We accept UPI, debit cards, credit cards and net banking.
